content.en:
Wooing a group of ancient demon-level powerhouses is also one of the ways to seek luck.

The Stygian Ancient Demon knew very well that even if the Luo Mother Main Division competed for the first place in the three hundred and sixty-five main divisions this time, it would be difficult for her to occupy one of the two peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses.

So, she had to fight.

Of course, if Arrow's mother doesn't win the first place, then her investment will be in vain.

But for the sake of that slim hope, it's still worth the gamble.

Ye Tian's strength is very strong, and she also understands it, although she is not yet a top Gu Demon-level powerhouse, but with Ye Tian's combat power, her role is definitely no less than those top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

Moreover, she didn't just count on Ye Tian alone, she would also recruit other ancient demon-level powerhouses.

"Lord Stygian Ancient Demon, I can sign a contract with you, but do I have any benefit?" Ye Tian is very realistic, if there is no benefit, he will not agree.

"25 I can give you enough resources, it depends on how much of the power of the Space-Time Ancient Demon Pillar of Qi and Fortune you can provide me. "

"General resources, I'm not interested!" Ye Tian shook his head and said.

"And what do you want?"

The Ancient Demon asked.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and said, "I want the inheritance of the Ultimate Ancient Demon!"

He has never obtained the inheritance of the Ultimate Ancient Demon, and what he can contact at present is only the inheritance of the Peak Ancient Demon, if he obtains the inheritance of the Ultimate Ancient Demon, it will be of great help to him in the future, even if he falls immediately and returns to his era, relying on the inheritance of the Ultimate Ancient Demon, he can steadily ascend to the Ultimate Ancient Demon realm.

"Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance!" "Stygian Ancient Demon Inheritance" Stygian Ancient Demon smiled, "God, Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance, I can indeed get it, but it also requires a lot of price, if you want the Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance, it requires a lot of luck, if you are a peak Ancient Demon level powerhouse, you may be able to do it, but you are just an ordinary Ancient Demon level powerhouse!"

Ye Tian said lightly: "Lord Crow Ancient Demon, how much luck power does it take to obtain the ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance?"

The Ancient Demon of the Crow said: "The power of luck of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space is the power of luck to kill ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouses, if you obtain 100,000 copies of the power of luck, I can call the shots and give you the power of the ultimate ancient demon inheritance." "

"Okay, if I can't meet this requirement, I'll exchange it for ordinary resources!" Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

The Stygian Ancients agreed.

Immediately, she signed an agreement with Ye Tian, and since then she has drawn Ye Tian into her camp.

Then, she went to pull her Gu Demon-level powerhouse.

......

"100,000 copies of the power of luck, you can't get so much luck power by killing ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouses, you have to kill the top ancient demon-level powerhouses!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If he was in the outside world, it would be difficult for him to kill those top ancient demon-level powerhouses, but there was hope to achieve it on the Huoxi space-time battlefield.

In the Huoxi space-time battlefield, the higher his cultivation, the more powerful he was suppressed, so he would not attack the realm of a top-level ancient demon-level powerhouse.

Cultivation cannot be improved, but other aspects can be improved.

Now, all of his secret methods of form have to be cultivated to the third form perfection realm, and he has also created a fourth form, and it won't be long before he can break through to the fourth form.

Especially the space-time form secret method, if he cultivates to the fourth form, he has four space-time rule realms, plus ten thousand law ultimate rule realms, that is five ultimate rule realms, how terrifying it is.

At that time, even if he encounters a weaker peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, he will be sure to save his life.

Since it was the beginning of the battle for the luck of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, although the peak Ancient Demon level powerhouse had entered, it had not yet reached the point of full-scale war, and it was all a small fight at the beginning.

Ye Tian didn't participate either, he was a quiet cultivator, and many copy bodies were all trying to comprehend and cultivate various forms of secret methods.

this day.

The Mystic Method of the Ten Thousand Laws Form was the first to break through, reaching the fourth form.

Then there was the secret method of the form of the golden body of Aluo, the secret method of the form of the arm of the arrow, and finally it was the turn of the secret method of the form of time and space.

When these four form secret methods all broke through to the fourth form, Ye Tian's strength reached a whole new level.

Moreover, his cultivation had truly reached the limit of the ordinary ancient demon level realm.

"Almost, now that many ancient demon-level powerhouses have entered, even the top ancient demon-level powerhouses have also entered, and I should also go and kill some ancient demon-level powerhouses!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Even if today's ancient demon-level powerhouses go out, they go out as a team, so that they can be combined into a team and be safer.

But.

Ye Tian has no interest in combining them into a team, his single strength is strong, and when he combines it with other ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouses to form a team, the combat effectiveness he exerts may not be as good as his!

So, he went it alone.

......

Ye Tian sensed the aura of thirteen Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, all of them were ordinary Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, and they should be a little short of the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

Their qi is connected, and the ultimate particles on their bodies are invisibly combined into a killing array, but it has not officially opened yet, once a battle breaks out, the killing array will be launched instantly.

"That's you!"

Ye Tian immediately burst out with all his strength, approached them with the golden light of Aromu, and then burst out with a single thought of 493 five Ultimate Rule Realms.

Rumble!!!

Before these thirteen Ancient Demon-level powerhouses could activate the killing array, they were crushed by the power of the five Ultimate Rule Realms, and then cast the sword light of Aromu.

Puff puff puff!!

The thirteen ancient demon-level powerhouses who hadn't even comprehended the Ultimate Rule Realm were directly killed by the sword light of Aromu.

"Sixteen parts of luck. "

Ye Tian sensed it, and there was a silent surprise in his heart.

Although it is said that killing an ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouse can only obtain one piece of space-time ancient demon pillar luck, some ordinary ancient-level powerhouses have quite good strength, and they have killed other ancient demon-level powerhouses, and they will definitely get more than one piece of luck by killing such an ancient demon-level powerhouse, maybe one or five parts, or even two parts.

Therefore, it was a good thing that he killed thirteen ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouses and harvested sixteen pieces of luck power.

In the days that followed, he continued to look for other Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, even top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, which was still his goal.

this day.

Ye Tian found the trace of a top ancient demon-level powerhouse, the other party was alone, and it was a suitable hunting target.

If he killed this top Ancient Demon level powerhouse, Ye Tian would definitely be able to obtain a lot of the luck power of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space.
